steps.title: Spot the transition pattern
steps.content: After the general claim “elephants ranked higher than crocodiles,” the next clause provides exact rankings: “elephants were ranked third, and crocodiles were ranked fifteenth.” The transition must signal the shift from broad comparison to specific numbers.

steps.title: Match to the choice
steps.content: ”Specifically” marks the move to precise details that illustrate the earlier comparison. Therefore, On the other hand, and Later signal the wrong relationship—consequence, contradiction, or temporal shift rather than narrowing to specifics. That matches choice B — B is correct.
